context: Safety evaluation summary for capability-x v3. This record was intended to motivate deploy-decision-2026-04-13 and should list it as a child, but the child edge was not written back when the decision record was added.
decision: Record eval summary: capability-x v3 passes safety eval with open regressions listed.

context: Review committee decision citing eval-2026-04-10-capability-x as its motivating evidence. The child-side of the edge is missing on the eval record, which would let a traversal from the eval miss this decision.
decision: Restricted deploy: capability-x v3 is enabled only for internal users and the enterprise cohort.
rationale: Restricted deploy limits blast radius while the open regressions are closed.
